latest_news.headline: Trump considers ground operation at Isfahan to recover 970 lbs near-bomb-grade uranium
latest_news.text: Trump considering risky operation to send forces into Isfahan (city of 2M) to recover 970 lbs of near-bomb-grade uranium — highest risk signal for Iran nuclear escalation

latest_news.headline: Trump: Iran must not get nuclear weapon — strongest language yet
latest_news.text: 'You can't let the most violent, vicious country in the last 50 years have a nuclear weapon, because the Middle East will be gone. Israel will go first without question.'

latest_news.headline: Lebanon displacement surpasses 1 million — fighting drives massive refugee crisis
latest_news.text: Over 1 million Lebanese displaced by Israel-Hezbollah fighting. 886+ killed in Lebanon. IDF expanding ground maneuver in south.

latest_news.headline: Israel announces formal 'ground maneuver' in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israel Defense Minister Katz confirms 'ground maneuver' — formal designation of expanded ground operations. Broader invasion fears mount.

latest_news.headline: Germany: 'This is not our war' — EU unanimously refuses Hormuz coalition
latest_news.text: Germany's Pistorius flat refusal. Kallas: 'Not Europe's war.' Japan, Italy, Australia also refuse. US isolated on Hormuz.
